title: Extra trailing space when using expressions
symptom: Using expressions in n8n results in an unexpected extra trailing space in the output string. This occurs specifically when formatting strings with expressions.
root_cause: In n8n, everything outside the expression delimiters `{{ }}` is treated as literal text, including spaces. If there are unintended spaces in the expression, they will be included in the output, leading to extra trailing spaces.
fix_steps: Identify the expression causing the issue
Remove any unintended spaces outside the `{{ }}` delimiters
Test the output again to confirm the fix
agent_instruction: Remove any extra spaces in your expressions to eliminate trailing spaces in the output.
